reviews.comment:
Estación vieja y de paso por obligación, les hace falta competencia para que le pongan onda. El combustible es más caro que en otros lados, raro siendo una YPF.

(Translated by Google)
An old station, a place you have to stop by out of necessity; they need competition to liven things up. The fuel is more expensive than elsewhere, which is odd for a YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3akpHQXlnRRAB
